blockingIssues.description: Finished-goods decomposition remains unresolved: FinishedGoodsWorkflowEngineService is still a 2119-line concentration of catalog, stock, reservation, and dispatch logic, while focused services continue as pass-through delegates instead of owning migrated business logic.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Harden backend-worker decomposition guardrails so decomposition is only considered complete when domain logic is actually migrated into focused services, not simply moved from one monolith class to a new engine/core class.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Re-run review for fix-product-catalog-scrutiny-issues found FinishedGoodsWorkflowEngineService at 2119 lines with focused services still delegating.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Extend backend-worker documentation checks to explicitly reconcile frontend-handoff DTO field lists with request/response DTOs changed in the same feature.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review found frontend-handoff data-contract bullets omitted newly added manufacturingDate/expiryDate fields despite DTO updates in RawMaterialBatchRequest and RawMaterialIntakeRequest.

rejectedObservations.observation: Frontend data-contract bullet drift for raw material DTO fields
rejectedObservations.reason: captured as non-blocking code-review issue for feature follow-up; not applied as shared-state update in this scrutiny round
